evaluation.canonical_allocation_scope_note: Canonical allocation surplus/deficit is evaluated over canonical_edges.jsonl only. Auxiliary unallocated observed edges are excluded from canonical allocation accounting.

extraction_notes.allocation_relations_definition: unique relations with positive extracted eta
extraction_notes.pattern_observed_definition: observed relation counts apportioned across that relation's positive allocation rows in proportion to row eta; this avoids double-counting multi-pattern relations

allocation_metrics.evaluation_note: Allocation metrics are computed from unique triples.

connectivity_metrics.connectivity_note: Weak connectivity is computed from unique triples.

evaluation_notes: Allocation metrics are computed from unique triples.
Raw graph rows and duplicate_triple_count are reported for duplicate-safety auditing.
The input graph and allocation files are read only and are never modified.
Pattern observed counts are apportioned by per-relation eta weights to avoid double-counting multi-pattern relations.
Allocation metrics are computed from unique triples.
relation_counts is an alias for unique_relation_counts.
Entity counts are computed from unique triples.

pattern_balance_summary.integer_total_note: Integer pattern totals round each eta-weighted relation-row contribution before summing.
pattern_balance_summary.observed_definition: observed relation counts apportioned across that relation's positive allocation rows in proportion to row eta; this avoids double-counting multi-pattern relations

score_reuse_assessment.reason: The H2 candidates do not expose old Phase II numeric score fields in their source rows. They expose provenance fields such as duplicate_provenance_count, source_stage, and provenance_type.

notes: This is an experimental auxiliary-connectivity graph candidate.
Auxiliary unallocated observed edges are not canonical benchmark triples.
